inputs.label: Mass of Solute
inputs.businessContext: The mass of the substance being measured (solute).

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass of the substance being measured (solute).
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des zu messenden Stoffes (gelöster Stoff).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La masse de la substance mesurée (soluté).
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la sustancia a medir (soluto).

inputs.label: Mass of Solution
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the solution (solute + solvent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the solution (solute + solvent).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale de la solution (soluté + solvant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de la solución (soluto + disolvente).

inputs.label: Volume of Solute
inputs.businessContext: The volume of the substance being measured (solute).

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume of the substance being measured (solute).
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des zu messenden Stoffes (gelöster Stoff).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le volume de la substance mesurée (soluté).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de la sustancia a medir (soluto).

inputs.label: Volume of Solution
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the solution (solute + solvent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the solution (solute + solvent).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de la solution (soluté + solvant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de la solución (soluto + disolvente).
